title: Cloth Beds
description: Zombie drops cloth for beds! Inspired from better than adventure
body:
![Cloths](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e84f0e7a9a5b6dc86bd53701ea57a5a0515df5e7.png)

# CLOTH BEDS
Ever thought that skipping the FIRST night kinda ruins the scaryness of the first night in minecraft? this mod aims to make beds a little bit longer to get. This is an existing feature from the mod [Better Than Adventure](https://www.betterthanadventure.net/). Cloth beds is just a modern port of that feature, with my own twist. My mod would not exist without theirs so I would like to give my thanks :D 

# Included Items
- Dirty Zombie Cloth (one on the left)
- Dirty Husk Cloth (one on the right)
- Cloth

## How To Get Dirty Cloths?
Both Zombie and Husk cloths are dropped their respective mobs. They have the same drop rate as rotten flesh.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/qUTYKagyOec" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## How To Get Clean Cloths?
Dirty cloths can be washed by right clicking on water holding the dirty cloth. Washing it gives you a clean cloth (simply cloth). Or Cloths can be crafted by 2 strings beside each other.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/W3LVp6hvRp0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Howw To Get Beds?
![Bed Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b39af604851413bdca9f1d0c1093b53dc1f909b6_0.webp)
Beds can be crafted like so. Wool can be changed for any other wool and give that specific colored bed like vanilla.

## NOTE
**Washing does NOT work in creative. you HAVE to change your gamemode to be able to wash**
